svg.aria-label: The chain product T 0 1 times T 1 2 and so on equals T 0 n, with the planar sum of reaches at accumulated angles shown as its closed form.
svg.text: Two views of the same pose
T₀ⁿ = T₀¹ · T₁² · … · Tₙ₋₁ⁿ (matrix product, general / 3D-ready)
gripper = Σ Lk(cosφk, sinφk), orientation = φn (planar closed form)
Matrix product and trig agree. Unit 4: the general T₀ⁿ(θ) map and midpoint.
